content: We can frame the iterative progress of cutting-edge active learning agent memory research between 2024 and 2025 itself as an autonomous curiosity-driven ICM-based reinforcement learning agent. This 'research progress agent' selects under-explored subproblems (unlabeled data for an active learning agent) to prioritize based on prediction error of existing research consensus (intrinsic reward from ICM), rather than just pursuing pre-specified benchmark improvements (extrinsic reward).
